description: Machine-readable map of org-level Tiinex identity and context files.
identity: Tiinex keeps provenance readable in Markdown artifacts you own.

current_public_grounding.role: schemas, artifact examples, policy material, topics, and semantics
validator, linting, and provenance pieces only; verify specific parts

files.authority: release notes and implementation status only

semantics.artifact: A readable Markdown record of some work, claim, decision, source boundary, evidence, policy, or continuation state.
semantics.provenance: The visible trail around material: where it came from, what changed, what supports it, and what limits apply.
semantics.root: The starting authority or boundary for a lineage.
semantics.parent: The declared continuity edge that says what an artifact follows from.
semantics.origin: Where the material came from or what grounds it.
semantics.transition: How one artifact became the next.
semantics.policy: Explicit boundaries around use, consent, attribution, interpretation, or continuation.
semantics.workspace: A view over artifacts and sources, not the whole project.

notes: AI and LLM workflows are use cases and pressure tests, not the identity boundary.
Tiinex is not only the viewer.
Tiinex is not only the schema docs.
Tiinex is not an AI agent or general-purpose AI runtime.
Status notes must not replace the stable identity files.
